name: 遗传
subject: biology
domain_name: A2 · 遗传与生物技术 / A2 · Inheritance & Biotech / A2 · Inheritance & Biotech
curriculum_points: 1.2 Cells as the basic units of living organisms (continued) Learning outcomes Candidates should be able to: 5 outline key structural features of a prokaryotic cell as found in a typical bacterium, including: • unicellular • generally 1–5 µm diameter • peptidoglycan cell walls • circular DNA • 70S ribosomes • absence of organelles surrounded by double membranes
